reviews.title: Good View and Pool - That is all
reviews.text:
My previous night's stay was at The Grand Ho Tram and since they were booked out for the following night, I decided to take a chance on Vietsovpetro despite the bad reviews. Boy was that a REGRET! 
Even upon calling them to check if there was a free shuttle service(which Agoda states), the girl who answered understood nothing and was very rude and hung up! Definitely NOT how you answer customer calls!

Booked an ocean view and the view is actually beautiful, room size was spacious, but room and hotel itself needs some serious maintenance and LIGHTING, feels creepy walking through the place with such dim and depressing light and decor.

Decided to play tennis as the information book mentioned(free 1hour) but no mention of hiring of racket and ball fees. Approached the guy at reception(the only one at the time with adequate English) to assist me on this and I confirmed with him if 'Everything is free?" "Yes, you're a guest so it's free" 
Arrived at the tennis court and another guy brings rackets and a set of balls and gives the hiring rate of 2 rackets(300,000VND) and 6 balls(150,000VND) Are you serious? Just for 1 hour and they can't provide free racket and balls? The staff's misinformation or lack thereof wasted both our times and was so disappointing!

It's such a big resort but has a sad feel to it, most leisure rooms or restaurants are either closed or just for show. 
The pool options are wonderful, you can really have your own space and relax.

Upon checking out the next day, I asked reception again if there were any shuttle service to Vung Tau or anywhere out! But they only offered a taxi option. They quoted several different estimates from 500k-600-800? Lack of information and lack of care for customers! So unprofessional! 

4-star hotel with no shuttle service especially being so far out from the city and inexperienced customer service staff with little to no English skills...
Dim future for this resort...Won't recommend to anyone.

reviews.title: Resort design is great but service is poor
reviews.text:
Positives:
The pool area is the highlight of this resort (as you can see in the pictures).
The beach is nice and clean (though the water is more brown than blue due to silt, as it is right along this part of the coast). 
The rooms are very comfortable.
Negatives:
The resort is very under-staffed. Minimal assistance or service available.
Pool water is clean - well filtered and chlorinated - but wasn't vacuumed properly on any of the 3 days we stayed. Always sand and dirt on the bottom... not too bad but very slack on behalf of the resort not to vacuum it properly every 24 hours.
An excellent variety of food available for breakfast but arriving after 8am any available tables were covered with dirty plates etc. (i.e. not enough staff to clear tables) and drink containers were empty more often than not. Again, just very slack due to a shortage of staff. 
Point of interest:
The resort is already showing signs of falling apart just one year after opening.

reviews.title: Quiet resort with beautiful beach and pool
reviews.text: This resort is quieter than most others and will be enjoyable for couples or families that wish to avoid the larger crowds going to The Grand. There is only one restaurant and service may be slow so an option is to drive out to explore food in other places. The beach is visibly dirtier & more polluted this time and this is probably not the resort's fault but a problem that needs to be tackled together by the government, all resorts and the travelers to preserved the beauty of the beaches. Overall, still a good value for money for couple & families desiring a quiet holiday.

reviews.title: Had the place all to ourselves!
reviews.text:
Nice stay, if a bit weird. We were the only Westerners there--only locals other than us, and very few of them at that. More than once, "The Shining" came to mind. However, the hotel proved to be comfortable and well-run, even though they only made up the room once. 

Although the hotel claimed to be "full", we probably saw only 40 other guests, total, in 4 days, 4 nights. Breakfast is good. This is an isolated spot, so bring any extras you need--snacks, drinks, sunblock, etc., as you will have to take a long cab ride to get said items. Also: There is an ATM in The Grand Hotel, a posh golf/casino/luxury resort, about 10 minutes to the north. Also: Ho Tram Beach Resort has a very nice ambiance, if mediocre food, for dinner. Only 3k to the north of here. Worth the walk or cab ride.
reviews.positives: The quiet, the pool, and the breeze

reviews.title: Not bad for your bucks!
reviews.text: It was not bad for the money. However, it would only true if there were not many people staying at this hotel. The reasons were: (1) the staffs at the restaurants could not service and refill the food quickly enough. So you had to wait a long time for a few dishes; (2) the sound proof of the room is almost zero. You can hear clearly what people talk or do in the hall each time they are around your room. This is very uncomfortable as people staying in this hotel were very inconsiderate. They were still talking and running and screaming even if it was at midnight. And the result was that you could not sleep and your young children woke up; (3) the pool looked nice but dirty as it seemed that not much cleaning was done.
reviews.positives: Location, view and price.

reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Dick,
Thank you for sharing your feedback following your recent stay at Vietsovpetro Resort. We sincerely apologize that your experience did not fully meet your expectations.
We have noted your comments regarding the resort location, swimming pool temperature, and food quality. These concerns have been shared with the relevant departments for review and improvement.
Your feedback is greatly appreciated and helps us enhance our services. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide a better experience in the future.

Kind regards,
Management Board
Vietsovpetro Resort

reviews.positives: Mình đến đây lần thứ 2. Vì không gian và cách phân chia phòng rất hợp lý. Mình có bé nhỏ vừa hay Vietsovpetro cũng có khi vui chơi cho bé. Bé nhà mình 2 tuổi rất thích tắm hồ bơi ở đây. Hôm mình đi là nhân dịp sinh nhật của mẹ mình. Các anh chị hết lòng sắp xếp với band để hát chúc mừng sinh nhật mẹ... Mình rất trân trọng và cảm thấy biết ơn các anh chị rất nhiều.
reviews.negatives: Ngày mình ở có các anh chị dùng loa kéo hát kara. Mọi chuyện không quá xa, nếu các anh chị hát lúc còn tỉnh táo và trước 22h... Nhưng mà 22h15 vẫn còn hét trong giọng lèm nhèm say xĩn. Nhà mình thì lại có bé nhỏ 2 tuổi đã ngủ lúc 20:30 nhưng cứ mỗi lần các chú hét lên là con bé giật mình khóc thét, quá tội con trẻ.

reviews.response:
Gửi gia đình chị Nguyệt Ánh,

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Vietsovpetro xin chân thành cảm ơn gia đình chị đã dành thời gian chia sẻ đánh giá về kỳ nghỉ vừa qua. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết gia đình hài lòng với không gian phòng rộng rãi, sạch sẽ cũng như bãi biển của khu nghỉ dưỡng.

Bên cạnh đó, chúng tôi xin ghi nhận góp ý về thực đơn buffet sáng chưa đa dạng và chưa đáp ứng tốt nhu cầu “healthy”. Đây là ý kiến rất quý giá để chúng tôi xem xét điều chỉnh, đa dạng hóa thực đơn và cải thiện chất lượng bữa sáng trong thời gian tới.

Rất mong sẽ sớm được đón tiếp gia đình chị Nguyệt Ánh quay trở lại trong những kỳ nghỉ tiếp theo!

Trân trọng,
Nguyễn Thiết Chung
Chuyên viên OTA

reviews.title: Ở ngắn để trải nghiệm thì ok
reviews.positives: Phòng rộng, sạch sẽ. Nhiều hồ bơi. Ăn sáng ngon. Có hỗ trợ tiếp sóng wifi khi mình phàn nàn sóng wifi yếu. Có cứu hộ ở khu vực hồ bơi và biển nên yên tâm hơn. Khuôn viên rộng nên đi lại thoải mái. Welcome drink có nhưng ko ai mời. Khách muốn uống thì phải tự đi lấy.
reviews.negatives: Check in giao cho loại phòng không đúng như mình đặt. Đặt phòng view biển nhưng sắp xếp vào phòng view vườn. Sau đó phản ảnh mới đổi lại đúng loại phòng mình yêu cầu và phải đứng chờ thật lâu mới có phòng. Check in thì lâu phải chờ đợi. Biển đẹp nhưng đường xuống biển thì một điểm trừ lớn. Trẻ em như con nhà mình lớn rồi mà đi xuống biển còn khó khăn. Mình thấy đường xuống khó đi, bẩn nên thôi ko xuống nữa. Resort nên cải tạo lại lối ra biển để thuận tiện cho khách. Đi biển mà ko được ra biển thì chán lắm.

reviews.title: Excellent hotel but somewhat dull
reviews.text:
The hotel is perfect if you want a quiet holiday and not really bothered about the food quality. The rooms are excellent. decent sized. the Staff attend to our needs very promptly. Though language was an issue - not many speak English.

Though the hotel has several restaurants, only one was open. That too with a very limited food option. There is nothing happening in the hotel, despite having all the facilities. Seems like a well designed resort going wasted. I wanted to have spa - there were none. 

The location is somewhere far from any town / eatery / shopping. We ended up driving 40KM to Vung Tao to have dinner and lunch!!

Gửi gia đình anh Thi,

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Vietsovpetro xin chân thành cảm ơn gia đình anh đã dành thời gian chia sẻ những đánh giá tích cực về kỳ nghỉ vừa qua. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết gia đình hài lòng với không gian tiện nghi, chất lượng phục vụ của đội ngũ nhân viên, cũng như sự phù hợp của khu nghỉ dưỡng đối với gia đình có trẻ nhỏ.

Những lời nhận xét của gia đình anh là nguồn động viên để chúng tôi tiếp tục duy trì và nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ, mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng ngày càng tốt hơn cho khách hàng.

Rất mong sẽ sớm được đón tiếp gia đình anh Thi quay trở lại trong những kỳ nghỉ sắp tới!

Trân trọng,
Nguyễn Thiết Chung
Chuyên viên OTA

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The resort has a system of saltwater and freshwater swimming pools. There are many pools with water levels of 0.7m, 1.2m, 1.5m, and 2m, suitable for both children and adults. The rooms are very spacious and luxurious, with very large bathrooms, bathtubs, toilets, and separate wash areas, allowing multiple people to use the bathroom at the same time. The TV uses Wi-Fi, so you can comfortably watch Internet programs. The beach in the resort area is not suitable for swimming due to high tides; however, you can walk to the nearby area for swimming. In this area, it can be a bit quiet in the evening, so our family drives to the Phuoc Hai embankment to enjoy seafood for fun, which is about 12 km away.

Dear Mr. Kelvin,

Vietsovpetro Resort sincerely thanks you for taking the time to share your feedback following your stay on April 22nd and 23rd.

We are pleased to know that you found the hotel to be good value for the price. At the same time, we sincerely regret that some aspects of your overall experience in the Ho Tram area did not meet your expectations, including the surrounding environment and nearby attractions.

Your comments are very valuable and will be shared appropriately for review and consideration. We also continuously strive to improve our facilities and services to better meet guest expectations.

We truly appreciate your stay with us and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again for a more enjoyable experience in the future.

Best regards,
Vietsovpetro Resort Team

reviews.title: Don't stay here. You've been warned.
reviews.positives: Multiple swimming pools and the maintenance and cleaners.
reviews.negatives:
Pool has no lighting, you have to walk to the bar and get your drinks if you are in the pool, there's no beach, our WiFi never worked in 3 days, they were doing construction which was noisy near the pool, there's no shops or anything near so prepare to pay top dollar for average food.

The place was like a ghost town, in 3 days I seen 20 people. So they turned off lighting and facilities to save on electricity. Even the. Buffet breakfast they only had it once due to lack of guests. Terrible.

In the end me and my family hated it that much that we only stayed 3 nights out of 5, left early and went to another hotel in ho chi minh.

If it wasn't bad enough at the hotel then trying to talk English to the staff at the front counter was a mission, when we checked out early we asked for our bill at the restaurant and bar for the day the lady told me we didn't have to pay anything and actually have me some money back.

On the way to ho chi minh I rang up and wanted to confirm if I had anything to pay again she said no. Then the next day I rang reception again and asked if I had an outstanding amount they said yes you have the bill from the restaurant and bar. They never called me about it I had to contact them.

I will never ever go back there again.

reviews.title: Great Hotel! Highly recommended!
reviews.text:
We had a pleasant stay at Vietsovpetro Ho Tram Resort and overall, it was a very positive experience for our family.

The room was clean and well-maintained, with fresh and neatly prepared bedsheets that made our stay comfortable. The bathtub was definitely a highlight, especially since my son truly enjoyed using it — it added extra relaxation and fun to our stay.

The food at the resort is slightly on the expensive side; however, the quality and taste made it worth the price. Every dish we tried was well-prepared and flavorful, which made dining a satisfying experience.

The resort offers a wide range of amenities, including billiards, table tennis, a football area, gym, and a tennis court. The swimming pool is spacious and well-maintained. We appreciated that it uses seawater, which was perfectly fine and added a unique touch to the experience.

We also want to commend the staff for being attentive and responsive. When we reported that the air conditioning was not cooling properly, they immediately responded and fixed the issue. Since it was close to the Lunar New Year holiday, they provided us with an additional fan to ensure comfort during the night, which we appreciated.

Lastly, the breakfast buffet was excellent, offering a wide variety of choices. The selection was generous, and the quality of food was impressive.

Overall, we had a comfortable and enjoyable stay, and we would recommend this resort to families looking for a relaxing getaway.

reviews.title: Beautiful pool, subpar overall
reviews.positives: The pool was lovely despite the one lacking tiles. The hotel should be aware that the umbrella structures are rusting and a few pieces or rusted wire are falling into the pool.
reviews.negatives: The breakfast is below a erage for the Rating of the hotel. Understandably the spread was small as there weren't many guests however what was on offer was subpar. The restaurant is rather pricey and instead of communicating that some ingredients were not ava6i received a Caesar salad with passion fruit dressing instead of the traditional dressing as stipulated on the menu. There were also no anchovies and the chicken tasted as though it had freezer burn. The cocktail which was supposed to have rum and cherry syrup had neither. When calling for room service the person who answered simply put the phone down. The pool bar was also closed despite the handbook saying it was open.

reviews.text: My first time here was a party of workers.   This last visit was with some friends.  The hotel did not dissappoint us.  It was great. reviews.title: Ok for 1-2 days
reviews.positives: Pretty flowers, pretty garden and pool around the outside of the building and large rooms with bath tubs. The staff assisted with ordering taxis, which was very helpful. Breakfast offered a lot of options.
reviews.negatives: While the outside of the building is decorated with pretty flowers, the experience inside is underwhelming and outdated. The rooms are large and have bath tubs with noisy boilers, but they didn't make up for the other shortcomings of the feeling of the hotel, unfortunately not having any character. Please note you will not be able to swim in the sea as there is no beach anymore due to sea level rising.

reviews.title: I'm not one to complain easily but 6/10 is almost a gift
reviews.positives: The staff was very friendly. As it wasn't too busy, at our arrival we had a room upgrade and that was very appreciated. It's probably been the biggest room I've ever had in any previous resort I visited. The swimming pool is exactly as the pictures advertised. The room had a huge balcony and that's surely a plus.
reviews.negatives: Because the resort was empty, the general vibe was a mix of The Shining and a Russian government building from the seventies. The name itself suggests it: "Viet-Sov-Petro". My bad for not picking up on that. The prices absolutely do not reflect the quality of either drinks nor food. Our room could've used some fresh air, it smelled like it hadn't been opened in months. Especially the wardrobe gave quite a whiff of the latter when opened. Same goes for the robes provided. That said, we simply kept the door open for a bit and the issue was solved. I could close an eye on everything mentioned before but what really annoyed us was the beach, or lack thereof. See the pictures attached to this review for yourself

Resort is quite large with 4 swimming pools for adult and children. However, it is quite not so hygienic since they not daily clean the pool's floor that make it quite slippery when we step on. Breakfast is quite good for Asia guests since more Asia guest's stay here. There is a big trouble here that resort organize party out door and they turn on the speaker at maximum volume from 3:00pm to 10:00pmthat make us feel quite disturbed since we travel with small children and they were hard to sleep well with such a loud speaker. We however receive no information or notice from resort manager about this issue and certainly no apology from them. We suffered from the noise both nights stay in the resort. Resort manager should know that they don't have only MICE guests but also other customer and they should respect for customer's holiday.

reviews.title: great vacation but very far from Vuntau city
reviews.text: we spent 1 night here for the weekend. we booked the president suit. it's very large but quite underutilised for a family of 5 like us. no microwave provided and the kitchen has no wash basin, maybe still under renovation. the pool is big. but there is no sand beach for my kids to play. the sea wave was very strong. breakfast was limited as we only eat vegetarian food as others are not suitable for Muslims. I also spent an hour at the spa for a very relaxing foot massage while my kids play at the playoom just next to the spa room. at night there is a local seafood restaurant near ho tram beach but the do not have english in the menu, we had to get help from our driver to tanslate the menu for us. it is 50 min drive from vungtau city and obviously too far from our favourite Gan Hao seafood restaurant. Next time we wont go for this hotel anymore as we prefer staying near vungtau city.
reviews.positives: large room, nice pool, great playroom for kids

reviews.title: Beautiful but transport from HCM was difficult and expensive.
reviews.positives:
The decor in the lobby and the rooms very bland. Not colourful.  Feels cold. 

The breakfast was fine but the meals, especially the western meals were not up to Western standard.  Need a better chef that has had western style cooking experience.  Like the chef at Azure restaurant in Ansagna hotel (Dhawa)

The staff at reception were very helpful and spoke good English. The staff in the restaurant need to learn English. 

Transport from Ho Chi Min City was difficult and we made mistake.  Can you clarify in your advertisement on Booking sites  how to get to the hotel from HCM without a car? Lucky the reception staff arrange transport to airport after our stay.

We really loved the pool, of course! 
We were luck to get a good deal. 

Transport was the main problem as expensive to get to resort by car. I tried to book a Red Bus but missed the bus so had to pay a millionVD to get to resort. I think my bus would actually have taken  me to Van Thau. It was my own fault but I had not enough information how to use a bus to get to resort. .

reviews.text: New apartment but spacious with wooden flooring and has a bathtub, beautiful view, fully furnished. Reasonable price for families with their own car. The nearby beach is quiet, which is nice.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi anh Minh,

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Vietsovpetro xin chân thành cảm ơn anh đã dành thời gian chia sẻ trải nghiệm của mình. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết anh hài lòng với không gian phòng rộng rãi, tiện nghi, view đẹp và mức giá phù hợp cho gia đình có phương tiện di chuyển riêng.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Suitable for families and couples on vacation, beautiful and spacious rooms, nice views, a diverse and rich buffet breakfast. The pool is clean and large. My family enjoyed our holiday here. I still want to come back if I get the chance to visit Ho Tram.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi chị Bích và gia đình!
Chân thành cảm ơn gia đình chị đã dành thời gian để chia sẻ với Khu nghỉ dưỡng về trải nghiệm của gia đình trong thời gian lưu trú vừa qua. Khu nghỉ dưỡng Vietsovpetro cảm thấy rất vui khi chị và gia đình đã tận hưởng những ngày nghỉ Lễ trọn vẹn nhất. Một lần nữa, chúng tôi rất mong sẽ sớm được đón tiếp và phục vụ gia đình anh chị trở lại trong thời gian tới.
Trân trọng,
Nguyễn Thiết Chung- chuyên viên OTA.

reviews.title: Well worth the stay.
reviews.positives: My room was huge and had everything that I needed. The bed and pillows were awesome, so comfortable! Food was excellent and so much to choose from. Staff polite and accommodating.
reviews.negatives: Nothing.

reviews.title: Extremely beautiful design.
reviews.text: The room is spacious with beautiful, luxurious wooden furniture. The most interesting feature is the light control system for the entire room next to the bed, and the lighting arrangement is quite practical. The bathroom is large and clean with a bathtub. The only point of dissatisfaction was when checking out early during a quiet time, but I still had to wait a long time because the receptionist kept discussing with a group of guests about missing a spoon. For a high-quality service, it shouldn't take so long over such a minor issue, as it is too small, and there are many quicker ways to resolve it! Overall, the view is beautiful, the beach is also quite empty with a nice bathing area, and the pool is very nice and clean.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Beautiful place, amazing scenery, clean beach, convenient bathroom. Friendly and enthusiastic staff. Will come again and recommend to friends.
reviews.response:

Trân trọng cám ơn gia đình anh chị đã dành thời gian để chia sẻ với Khu nghỉ dưỡng về trải nghiệm của gia đình trong thời gian lưu trú vừa qua. Khu nghỉ dưỡng Vietsovpetro hy vọng mãi luôn luôn là địa chỉ tin cậy của gia đình anh chị và tất cả khách hàng. Chúng tôi rất mong sẽ sớm được đón tiếp và phục vụ gia đình anh chị trở lại trong thời gian tới để gia đình mình tận hưởng trọn vẹn cho kỳ nghỉ. 
Trân trọng, 
Ban Lãnh Đạo Khu Nghỉ Dưỡng Vietsovpetro.

reviews.title: True resort quality.
reviews.text: Vietsopetro Ho Tram is a true resort destination and the most suitable place for families to enjoy a vacation or host family events at a reasonable cost. The resort features a beautiful large pool system ideal for families. However, the resort lacks a little something for the beach.

reviews.title: Deserving of a 4-star rating.
reviews.text: I have been to Ho Tram many times; here, I have bathed in the sea and the pool. The rooms are spacious and clean, and the environment is beautiful. It is suitable for a longer stay because the price is reasonable. I have recommended it to my friends to come here.

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel worth the money, extremely friendly staff.
reviews.text: The room is very beautiful and clean. Especially the view is extremely nice and comfortable for the price range. The breakfast buffet is nothing special, but the staff is very friendly and helpful at all times.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Chị Ngọc,
Khu nghỉ dưỡng Vietsovpetro chân thành cảm ơn Chị đã dành thời gian chia sẻ trải nghiệm lưu trú tại đây.
Chúng tôi rất vui khi Chị hài lòng với phòng nghỉ, đặc biệt là hướng phòng đẹp và sự thoải mái so với chi phí. Đồng thời, chúng tôi cũng ghi nhận góp ý của Chị về buffet sáng để tiếp tục cải thiện chất lượng dịch vụ.
Đặc biệt, chúng tôi rất trân trọng những lời khen dành cho đội ngũ nhân viên. Đây là nguồn động lực để chúng tôi không ngừng nâng cao chất lượng phục vụ.
Rất mong được chào đón Chị quay trở lại trong thời gian tới.

Trân trọng,
Nguyễn Thiết Chung
Chuyên viên OTA
Khu nghỉ dưỡng Vietsovpetro
